title: Angry Customer - Demanding a Manager
description: A customer is irate over a series of repeated failures and immediately demands to speak to a supervisor.

persona.name: Robert
persona.goal: Speak to someone in charge to complain about poor service

background_context: This is the customer's 4th call regarding a broken appliance replacement. Previous agents promised action but nothing happened. They refuse to explain the problem again and just want a manager.
success_criteria: Attempt to de-escalate and take ownership before transferring
Explain the transfer process clearly if they insist on a manager
common_mistakes: Transferring immediately without attempting to assist
Asking them to repeat the entire issue
